HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel responses to special, form, and form (employment) interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process.
